events.text: Goal!  Australia 0, Netherlands 1. Arjen Robben (Netherlands) left footed shot from the left side of the box to the centre of the goal. Assisted by Daley Blind with a headed pass   following a fast break.
Goal!  Australia 1, Netherlands 1. Tim Cahill (Australia) left footed shot from the left side of the box to the high centre of the goal. Assisted by Ryan McGowan.
Tim Cahill (Australia) is shown the yellow card.
Robin van Persie (Netherlands) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Goal!  Australia 2, Netherlands 1. Mile Jedinak (Australia) converts the penalty with a right footed shot to the bottom left corner.
Goal!  Australia 2, Netherlands 2. Robin van Persie (Netherlands) left footed shot from the centre of the box to the high centre of the goal. Assisted by Memphis Depay with a through ball.
Goal!  Australia 2, Netherlands 3. Memphis Depay (Netherlands) right footed shot from outside the box to the bottom right corner. Assisted by Jonathan de Guzmán.
